subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath made manifest the Path, sent down the Proof, and summoned all unto Him with an argument that none can equal [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی اظهر السبیل و انزل الدلیل و دعا الکل الیه بحجه لاتعادلها
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @laws of God; of the Kitab-i-Aqdas, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @love and unity, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
